about.label: About
about.title: What I Do

services.title: Full-Stack Development
services.description: Complete website creation cycle: from prototyping in Figma to layout and CMS integration. Responsiveness, SEO optimization and high performance.

philosophy.title: Attention to Detail
philosophy.description: Every pixel matters. I create systems that scale and last long.

about.description1: I'm a developer with 1.5+ years of experience creating web applications and interfaces. I specialize in modern technologies and development approaches, always striving for clean code and excellent user experience.
about.description2: During my work, I've successfully implemented 12+ projects — from small landing pages to complex SPA applications. I've worked with both small startups and large companies, helping them create products that solve real user problems.
about.description3Text: Focus on business metrics, clean code, modern development practices, and most importantly — understanding the needs of users and business.

features.developmentDesc: Clean, scalable code using modern frameworks and best practices
features.designDesc: Creating intuitive interfaces with focus on user experience and visual appeal
features.optimizationDesc: Improving performance and loading speed for better user experience

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.startDesc: First steps in web development, learning HTML, CSS and JavaScript basics. Working on first projects and gaining practical experience.
timeline.growthDesc: Deepening knowledge in React, TypeScript and modern development tools. Working on more complex projects and improving skills.
timeline.nowDesc: Active development of modern web applications, working with various technologies and continuous learning of new approaches.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.qualityDesc: Striving to write clean, maintainable code following best development practices
achievements.innovationDesc: Using modern technologies and approaches to create effective solutions
achievements.passionDesc: Genuine love for development and constant desire to create something new and interesting

footer.title: Let's Discuss
footer.description: Ready to answer any questions and help bring your ideas to life. Choose a convenient way to contact!
